title: Physically smoke-test T-Deck SD card storage
description: Run the T-Deck SD validation firmware on physical hardware with a removable SD card. Validate UART shell mount/read/write/list/unlink on a sacrificial FAT card, no-card and bad-card behavior, GPIO10 power assumptions, SD CS GPIO39 behavior, LoRa/display coexistence on shared SPI3, and safe SD SPI frequency. Start at the no-hardware validated 4 MHz setting before any frequency sweep.
notes:
Blocked: requires physical LilyGO T-Deck hardware, SD card, USB serial access, and optionally a logic analyzer/scope for GPIO9/GPIO12/GPIO39 SPI CS coexistence.
No-hardware parent completed the build/DTS/Kconfig validation path only. Physical acceptance remains blocked on a real LilyGO T-Deck, removable SD card, USB serial console, and optional logic analyzer/scope. Use lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_sd_validation.conf plus .overlay; verify FAT mount via shell without auto-format, create/read/delete sentinel files, exercise no-card/bad-card cases, confirm GPIO10 power assumptions, and validate LoRa/display coexistence with SD on SPI3.
